Knowledge Base

11 entries across 4 domains

skill 9 pattern 1 learning 1
skill security 95%

Review code for SQL injection, command injection, path traversal, and hardcoded credentials before merge.

securitycode-reviewowasp
pattern resilience 85%

Wrap external API calls in error boundaries that log, retry with backoff, and degrade gracefully.

error-handlingresilienceapi
learning testing 78%

Prioritize test fidelity (does the test prove what it claims?) over coverage percentage.

testingqualityverification
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

Rewrite each description to score 5/5. Follow seven principles: 1. **Lead with the problem, not the action.** "Check for known pitfalls" not "Query the knowledge base." The agent doesn't care what th
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

Skill 'ax-rubric': Score agent-facing tool descriptions against the AX Description Rubric. Takes a tool description, scores it 0-5 on agent discoverability, explains failures, and rewrites it to pass.
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

If the user provides the tool's response format or schema, also evaluate: - Does the response include `so_what` fields (actionable implications, not just data)? - Does the response report `token_cost
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

For each tool description reviewed, produce: ``` ### {tool_name} **Score: {n}/5** | Criterion | Result | Notes | |-----------|--------|-------| | Output shape | pass/fail | {one line} | | Cost sign
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

If the user provides multiple descriptions (e.g., an MCP server's full tool set), score all of them in a summary table first: ``` | Tool | Score | Worst gap | |------|-------|-----------| | tool_a |

skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

### Invisible (1/5) > "Query the knowledge base for structured learnings, patterns, and skills relevant to your current work context." Why it fails: no output shape, no cost signal, no trigger, no s
skill skill:ax-rubric 75%

The user will provide one or more tool descriptions. These may come from: - MCP server tool definitions - API endpoint documentation - Claude Code skill descriptions - OpenAPI/Swagger specs - Internal
